title: madhuca vulpina
intro: Madhuca vulpina, also known as the Indian butter tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Madhuca vulpina include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Madhuca vulpina include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and creams for various health applications.
